layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize lifecycle policy posture and expose the cleanup staging action.

layoutRegions.name: lifecycle-policy-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect joiner, mover, leaver, and contractor lifecycle phases with manager handoff status.

layoutRegions.name: identity-and-drift-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare stale identities, suspended accounts, entitlement drift, and exception windows.

layoutRegions.name: cleanup-plans
layoutRegions.purpose: Stage rollback-safe lifecycle cleanup plans with manager handoff fallbacks.

components.name: LifecyclePolicyCard
components.purpose: Shows one lifecycle phase with subject, manager, evidence, and aligned, handoff, or cleanup state.
interactions: state is visible through tokenized border color
card content stays stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: EntitlementDriftRow
components.purpose: Captures app entitlement drift, affected identity, exception window, and cleanup status.
interactions: grid collapses without hiding exception window details

components.name: LifecycleCleanupPlan
components.purpose: Captures lifecycle cleanup action and rollback-safe recovery path.
interactions: rollback note remains visible at narrow widths

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
